name: shepherdsoft-ts
description: Vue 3 + NestJS rewrite of ShepherdSoft (branch-user side).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "pnpm -F backend start:dev" "pnpm -F frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm -F @shepherd/shared build && pnpm -F backend build && pnpm -F frontend build
